X^20 - X^19*Y + 744*X^19 + 196764*X^18 + 114*X^17*Y + 21408744*X^17 + 190*X^16*Y + 842900838*X^16 - 
    5073*X^15*Y + 18021846408*X^15 - 16416*X^14*Y + 247470430652*X^14 + 97983*X^13*Y + 
    2378790004632*X^13 + 519042*X^12*Y + 16832768334177*X^12 - 444030*X^11*Y + 90478701945424*X^11 - 
    6935646*X^10*Y + 376813671380832*X^10 - 9356265*X^9*Y + 1230336247503168*X^9 + 30202704*X^8*Y + 
    3167090980261888*X^8 + 101838024*X^7*Y + 6427791537328128*X^7 + 54954270*X^6*Y + 
    10228514018144256*X^6 - 190349904*X^5*Y + 12607776060866560*X^5 - 358921248*X^4*Y + 
    11787418347110400*X^4 - 196605312*X^3*Y + 8074192060416000*X^3 + 51363840*X^2*Y +
